title: Market Catalyst Research Universe
note: Curated catalyst-research reference — who/what/where to watch for market-moving catalysts. Decision support only; not advice, not a prediction, and not a buy/sell list.

people.name: Federal Reserve / FOMC
people.tickers: SPY, QQQ, TLT, DXY, banks, housing
people.why: Policy statement, dot plot, minutes, and chair press conference reset discount rates and risk appetite.
people.impactExample: Caused: Powell's 2022 Jackson Hole speech coincided with S&P 500 -3.4% and Dow -1,000 points on Aug. 26, 2022.
people.bestMonitor: Fed site, RSS, press conference, minutes
people.queries: site:federalreserve.gov FOMC statement projections minutes
people.limitations: Market impact depends on surprise versus rates curve pricing.

people.name: Jerome Powell and Fed chair communications
people.why: Chair language often matters more than the rate decision when policy path is uncertain.
people.impactExample: Caused: Jackson Hole 2022 "pain" message triggered a broad risk-off session.
people.queries: Powell speech inflation labor market rate cuts
people.limitations: Role-dependent; monitor the office as much as the person.

people.name: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics
people.why: CPI and jobs surprises alter Fed expectations instantly.
people.impactExample: Caused: Hot CPI on Sep. 13, 2022 coincided with S&P 500 -4.3%, one of 2022's largest one-day drops.
people.queries: BLS CPI core services shelter surprise
people.limitations: Data revisions and seasonal factors can reverse first read.

people.name: Hindenburg Research
people.tickers: ADANI, NKLA, CLOV, IEP, listed targets
people.why: Detailed public short reports can trigger immediate repricing and regulatory follow-through.
people.impactExample: Caused: Adani Group lost over $100bn in market value after Jan. 2023 report; Nikola fell sharply after Sep. 2020 report.
people.queries: Hindenburg Research new report ticker
people.limitations: Short bias; claims require independent verification.

people.name: Nvidia / Jensen Huang
people.tickers: NVDA, AMD, TSM, AVGO, SMCI, SOXX
people.why: Guidance, product roadmap, supply commentary, and GTC keynotes drive the AI capex trade.
people.impactExample: Caused: NVDA surged about 24-25% after May 2023 AI-driven revenue guide, lifting AI semis.
people.bestMonitor: IR, GTC, earnings call, product keynotes
people.queries: Nvidia guide data center Blackwell supply HBM
people.limitations: High expectations make direction dependent on whisper numbers.

people.name: Elon Musk
people.why: Posts and interviews can move Tesla, EV sentiment, and crypto narratives.
people.impactExample: Caused: Aug. 7, 2018 "funding secured" tweet lifted Tesla about 11% before SEC action and later litigation.
people.queries: from:elonmusk Tesla delivery FSD China funding
people.limitations: High false-positive rate; humor and ambiguity often move price without durable fundamentals.

people.name: OPEC+ and Saudi Energy Ministry
people.why: Production cuts or quota changes can reprice crude, inflation breakevens, and energy equities.
people.impactExample: Caused: Surprise Apr. 2023 output cut drove oil up about 6%.
people.bestMonitor: OPEC releases, JMMC meetings, Saudi statements
people.queries: OPEC+ surprise cut quota compliance Saudi voluntary cut
people.limitations: Leaks and trial balloons are common; wait for official communique.

people.name: Keith Gill / Roaring Kitty
people.why: Posts can reignite retail flow and options gamma dynamics in heavily shorted names.
people.impactExample: Caused: May 13, 2024 X post sent GME up about 66% intraday; Jan. 2021 saga saw extreme multi-week squeeze.
people.queries: Roaring Kitty GME position YOLO update
people.limitations: Signal is mostly flow and reflexivity, not fundamental value.

people.name: Elliott Management
people.tickers: CRM, NRG, ATUS, global large caps
people.why: Stake disclosures and letters often force margin, asset sale, buyback, or board-change debates.
people.impactExample: Caused: Salesforce rose about 3% after Jan. 2023 Elliott stake report.
people.queries: Elliott Management stake letter board margin
people.limitations: Activist outcomes depend on board response and shareholder support.

people.name: Carl Icahn / Icahn Enterprises
people.why: Stake disclosures historically moved targets and can start strategic-review pressure.
people.impactExample: Caused: Netflix shares soared after Icahn disclosed roughly 10% stake in Oct. 2012.
people.queries: Icahn 13D stake undervalued sale
people.limitations: Influence has varied with fund performance and target size.

people.name: Bill Ackman / Pershing Square
people.why: Public letters and presentations can focus market attention on governance, fraud, or capital allocation.
people.impactExample: Caused: 2012 Herbalife short thesis pressured HLF initially and triggered multi-year regulatory/activist battle.
people.queries: Ackman presentation short thesis stake
people.limitations: Talks his book; some high-profile theses failed or reversed.

people.name: Berkshire Hathaway / Warren Buffett
people.tickers: BRK, AAPL, OXY, BAC, Japan trading houses
people.why: 13F changes, annual letter, and deal announcements influence quality/value sentiment.
people.impactExample: Caused: Berkshire stakes in OXY and Japanese trading houses repeatedly moved investor attention and target prices.
people.queries: Berkshire 13F new stake OXY buyback letter
people.limitations: 13F data is delayed; positions may be stale.

people.name: FDA CDER / CBER
people.why: PDUFA, adcom, CRL, label, REMS, and safety decisions can reprice biotech equity value overnight.
people.impactExample: Caused: FDA approvals can double small biotech stocks; complete response letters can erase financing runway.
people.queries: FDA PDUFA advisory committee briefing documents ticker
people.limitations: No official master PDUFA calendar; company disclosures fill gaps.

people.name: U.S. Treasury
people.why: Refunding, auction sizes, cash balance, sanctions, and debt-ceiling actions move duration and liquidity.
people.impactExample: Caused: Quarterly refunding surprises have moved Treasury yields and equity duration proxies.
people.queries: Treasury refunding coupon sizes buyback TBAC minutes
people.limitations: Market impact is curve-positioning dependent.

people.name: Donald Trump / White House trade policy
people.why: Tariffs, sanctions, and executive-order headlines can cause broad gap risk and sector rotations.
people.impactExample: Caused: Prior tariff escalation days drove large index and China-exposed equity moves.
people.bestMonitor: White House, Federal Register, Truth Social/X, USTR
people.queries: tariff executive order China autos semiconductors
people.limitations: Political statements can be negotiating tactics; official implementation matters.

people.name: European Central Bank / Christine Lagarde
people.why: ECB decisions and press conference language drive euro rates and bank margins.
people.impactExample: Caused: ECB rate-path shifts often move EUR, bunds, and European bank equities.
people.queries: ECB Lagarde press conference inflation wages
people.limitations: Fragmentation and sovereign spread risk can dominate policy signal.

people.name: Bank of Japan / Governor communications
people.why: Yield-curve-control and normalization changes can spill into global bond markets.
people.impactExample: Caused: Dec. 2022 surprise YCC adjustment jolted yen and global bond markets.
people.queries: BOJ yield curve control JGB purchase yen intervention
people.limitations: Leaks and local press previews can move markets before official decision.

people.name: People's Bank of China / State Council / Politburo
people.tickers: CNH, H-shares, miners, luxury, internet ADRs
people.why: Stimulus, reserve requirement, property, tech, and reopening policy can drive global cyclicals.
people.impactExample: Caused: China stimulus and regulatory headlines repeatedly moved China internet, metals, and luxury names.
people.queries: China Politburo stimulus property reserve requirement
people.limitations: Translation, implementation, and local-policy follow-through matter.

people.name: SEC and SEC Chair communications
people.why: Enforcement, rulemaking, ETF decisions, and market-structure proposals can move regulated financials and crypto.
people.impactExample: Caused: Crypto enforcement and spot ETF decisions have moved bitcoin, exchanges, and miners.
people.queries: SEC enforcement Coinbase ETF approval rulemaking
people.limitations: Legal outcomes often take months or years after initial headline.

people.name: FTC / DOJ Antitrust Division
people.tickers: MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, pharma M&A
people.why: Merger challenges and monopolization suits can reprice deal probability and business models.
people.impactExample: Caused: Major tech and healthcare antitrust filings have moved target/acquirer spreads and mega-cap sentiment.
people.queries: DOJ FTC antitrust complaint merger injunction ticker
people.limitations: Early complaints do not equal final remedy; court calendars matter.

people.name: Muddy Waters / Carson Block
people.marketArea: Single stocks, China ADRs, accounting risk
people.why: Forensic short reports can reveal accounting or governance gaps before regulators act.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Muddy Waters amplified Luckin Coffee allegations before Luckin disclosed fabricated sales and stock collapsed in 2020.
people.queries: Muddy Waters report fraud accounting ticker
people.limitations: Short bias; anonymous-source claims need careful corroboration.

people.name: Citron Research / Andrew Left
people.why: Historically influential short calls can trigger volatility even when wrong.
people.impactExample: Caused: Citron's 2021 GME short call became a catalyst for retail backlash and squeeze dynamics.
people.queries: Citron short report price target ticker
people.limitations: Track as volatility catalyst, not necessarily truth signal.

people.name: Starboard Value / Jeff Smith
people.why: Operational activist campaigns can change margin targets and strategic alternatives.
people.impactExample: Caused: Vertiv rose over 10% after Starboard disclosed stake in Oct. 2022.
people.queries: Starboard Value stake presentation margin board
people.limitations: Less impact when target already has self-help priced in.

people.name: Trian Partners / Nelson Peltz
people.why: Proxy fights and board campaigns focus debate on margins, succession, capital allocation.
people.impactExample: Caused: Disney proxy campaigns affected sentiment and helped frame cost-cutting debate in 2023-2024.
people.queries: Trian proxy fight board seats presentation
people.limitations: Election losses can unwind campaign premium.

people.name: Michael Burry / Scion Asset Management
people.tickers: Regional banks, China ADRs, shorts, SPY/QQQ puts
people.why: Filings and posts can attract attention to crowded risks or contrarian longs.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Known for housing-crisis short; later 13F positions often trigger media and retail attention.
people.queries: Scion 13F Burry puts short
people.limitations: 13F lag is large and derivatives disclosure can be misread.

people.name: David Einhorn / Greenlight Capital
people.tickers: LEH history, GM, GLRE, single-name shorts
people.why: Sohn presentations and letters can spotlight accounting or capital allocation issues.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Lehman critique before 2008 collapse remains a template for forensic short influence.
people.queries: Einhorn Sohn short thesis Greenlight letter
people.limitations: Public signals are intermittent and sometimes delayed.

people.name: Dan Loeb / Third Point
people.why: Public letters can catalyze break-up, buyback, and management-change debates.
people.impactExample: Caused: Disney campaign added board/governance pressure before later activist waves.
people.queries: Third Point letter stake split board
people.limitations: Some letters are private until leaked or summarized.

people.name: Ryan Cohen
people.why: Stake disclosures and cryptic posts can trigger retail interest and governance repricing.
people.impactExample: Caused: Jan. 2021 GameStop board appointment was an early squeeze catalyst.
people.queries: Ryan Cohen 13D board letter GameStop
people.limitations: Cryptic posts are high-noise; filings are higher signal.

people.name: Jamie Dimon / JPMorgan
people.why: Bank earnings, credit commentary, and annual letter inform credit cycle and capital-market risk.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Repeated recession, CRE, and liquidity warnings influence financial-sector narrative.
people.queries: Dimon credit losses CRE consumer annual letter
people.limitations: Macro views are influential but not always timely trading signals.

people.name: Tim Cook / Apple
people.tickers: AAPL, QCOM, SWKS, TSM, China suppliers
people.why: iPhone demand, China, services, and capital-return commentary affect a mega-cap index weight and suppliers.
people.impactExample: Caused: Apple guidance and product-cycle commentary frequently move suppliers and Nasdaq sentiment.
people.bestMonitor: Earnings, WWDC, product launches, supply-chain press
people.queries: Apple iPhone China services margin guidance
people.limitations: Supply-chain leaks can be early but noisy.

people.name: Satya Nadella / Microsoft
people.tickers: MSFT, NVDA, ORCL, CRM, cloud peers
people.why: Azure AI growth and capex commentary affect software, semis, and AI infrastructure read-throughs.
people.impactExample: Caused: AI and cloud disclosures have repeatedly moved MSFT and AI supply-chain names.
people.bestMonitor: Earnings, Build, Ignite, OpenAI partnership updates
people.queries: Microsoft Azure AI capex copilot guide
people.limitations: Backlog and capacity comments are often hard to compare across quarters.

people.name: Mark Zuckerberg / Meta
people.why: Capex, AI, Reels, and expense discipline can move ad-tech and AI infrastructure sentiment.
people.impactExample: Caused: 2022-2023 expense-reset and "year of efficiency" commentary drove large META repricing.
people.queries: Meta capex AI ads Reels guidance
people.limitations: Capex headlines can swamp core ad performance.

people.name: Lisa Su / AMD
people.why: AI accelerator and server CPU commentary provides second read on data-center demand and competition.
people.impactExample: Caused: MI300 and data-center updates have moved AMD and AI chip peers.
people.queries: AMD MI300 MI350 GPU guide customer traction
people.limitations: Competitive claims need customer and supply-chain corroboration.

people.name: TSMC management
people.why: Monthly revenue, capex, node utilization, and AI demand frame global chip cycle.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: TSMC monthly revenue often confirms or challenges AI/Apple supply-chain narratives.
people.queries: TSMC monthly revenue capex AI demand utilization
people.limitations: Currency and customer mix complicate read-throughs.

people.name: ASML management
people.why: Bookings, backlog, China export restrictions, and EUV demand signal capex cycle.
people.impactExample: Caused: ASML order-book surprises have moved global semiconductor equipment shares.
people.queries: ASML bookings EUV China export control backlog
people.limitations: Orders are lumpy and can reflect timing rather than demand collapse.

people.name: Michael Saylor / MicroStrategy
people.why: Bitcoin purchase announcements and financing plans move MSTR premium and crypto-equity sentiment.
people.impactExample: Caused: Repeated BTC purchase and convertible issuance headlines have moved MSTR and miner sympathy.
people.queries: MicroStrategy bitcoin purchase convertible ATM
people.limitations: Equity impact is leverage and premium-driven, not just BTC price.

people.name: Brian Armstrong / Coinbase
people.why: Regulatory commentary, product launches, and exchange-volume updates affect Coinbase and crypto policy sentiment.
people.impactExample: Caused: SEC litigation and product/regulatory updates have moved COIN materially.
people.queries: Coinbase SEC litigation staking volume custody ETF
people.limitations: Crypto beta often dominates idiosyncratic news.

people.name: Binance / CZ and exchange leadership
people.why: Exchange legal, solvency, listing, delisting, or settlement headlines can move crypto liquidity.
people.impactExample: Caused: Binance regulatory headlines have repeatedly moved BNB and broader crypto sentiment.
people.queries: Binance settlement outflows reserves delisting
people.limitations: Rumors are frequent; verify with on-chain and official statements.

people.name: Cathie Wood / ARK Invest
people.why: Daily trade disclosures and thematic research influence retail growth-stock narratives.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: ARK buying/selling has highlighted high-beta innovation rotations, especially 2020-2022.
people.queries: ARK trade notification TSLA COIN AI genomics
people.limitations: Retail signal can be contrarian during crowded drawdowns.

people.name: Ray Dalio / Bridgewater
people.why: Macro framework and public warnings influence institutional debate on debt cycles and geopolitics.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Long-running debt-cycle and China commentary has shaped macro allocation conversations.
people.queries: Dalio debt cycle China gold reserve currency
people.limitations: Useful for regime framing, less for precise event timing.

people.name: Stanley Druckenmiller / Duquesne
people.why: Public comments and 13F changes can validate or challenge macro and AI positioning.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Public AI and fiscal-risk comments have influenced investor debate around crowded themes.
people.queries: Druckenmiller AI Nvidia rates fiscal deficit
people.limitations: Public remarks are sparse and often after positions change.

people.name: Jeffrey Gundlach / DoubleLine
people.why: Fixed-income webcasts and recession calls shape credit and duration debate.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Yield-curve and credit warnings often precede broader macro risk discussions.
people.queries: Gundlach yield curve recession credit spreads
people.limitations: Forecast timing can be early; better as risk monitor.

people.name: Nick Timiraos / Wall Street Journal
people.why: Fed reporting is closely watched as a read on policy debate and communication strategy.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: WSJ Fed previews have moved market odds before FOMC decisions.
people.queries: Nick Timiraos Fed preview rate decision
people.limitations: Reporting is interpretive; not an official Fed source.

people.name: Mark Gurman / Bloomberg
people.why: Apple product and roadmap reporting can move supplier expectations before launches.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: Apple headset, iPhone, and AI feature reports have shaped supplier and product-cycle sentiment.
people.queries: Gurman Apple launch iPhone AI supplier
people.limitations: Product timing can slip; supplier economics differ from launch buzz.

people.name: Ming-Chi Kuo
people.tickers: AAPL, TSM, Largan, Hon Hai, QCOM
people.why: Apple and hardware supply-chain notes often lead product-cycle expectations.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: iPhone and headset supply-chain checks have moved supplier narratives.
people.bestMonitor: Medium, X, broker notes where available
people.queries: Ming-Chi Kuo iPhone shipment cut supplier
people.limitations: Supply-chain checks can mistake production timing for demand.

people.name: Dan Ives / Wedbush
people.why: Widely syndicated analyst calls can reinforce retail and media narratives around tech catalysts.
people.impactExample: Caused: High-visibility TSLA and AI target changes often affect premarket sentiment.
people.queries: Dan Ives Tesla price target AI checks
people.limitations: Often narrative-amplifying rather than primary information.

people.name: Adam Jonas / Morgan Stanley
people.why: Autonomy, EV, and valuation-framework notes can shift long-duration auto narratives.
people.impactExample: Caused: Tesla target and autonomy scenario notes have moved TSLA sentiment in multiple cycles.
people.queries: Adam Jonas Tesla autonomy price target
people.limitations: Scenario values can be highly assumption-sensitive.

people.name: Jim Cramer / CNBC
people.why: Can amplify narratives and short-term retail demand around earnings or product stories.
people.impactExample: Caused: Mentions can create short-lived retail flow, especially small/mid-cap names.
people.queries: Cramer buy sell recommendation ticker
people.limitations: High entertainment bias; use as sentiment input only.

people.name: ZeroHedge
people.why: Fast aggregation of macro and positioning narratives can precede wider retail/institutional discussion.
people.impactExample: Caused: Viral macro posts can move attention around bank, China, or rates stress before confirmation.
people.queries: ZeroHedge bank stress swap spreads liquidity
people.limitations: Strong bias and rumor risk; verify through primary sources.

people.name: Walter Bloomberg
people.why: Rapid headline relay can alert a finance agent before full article publication.
people.impactExample: Caused: Fast reposts can trigger short-lived market reactions around policy, OPEC, and company headlines.
people.queries: from:DeItaone Fed OPEC FDA merger
people.limitations: Aggregator only; not primary, prone to context loss.

people.name: International Energy Agency
people.why: Oil market reports and demand forecasts influence crude balances and energy equities.
people.impactExample: Anticipated: IEA demand/supply revisions often move oil narrative around OPEC decisions.
people.queries: IEA oil demand revision inventory supply
people.limitations: Forecasts can conflict with OPEC and private data.

people.name: U.S. Energy Information Administration
people.why: Weekly petroleum and gas storage data can move crude, products, and natural gas.
people.impactExample: Caused: Large inventory surprises regularly move WTI, gasoline, and natgas futures intraday.
people.queries: EIA crude draw build gasoline distillate storage surprise
people.limitations: Weather, exports, and refinery outages complicate read-through.

people.name: U.S. Supreme Court / major courts
people.why: Rulings can alter regulatory power, damages, patents, merger probability, and business models.
people.impactExample: Caused: Patent, antitrust, and administrative-law rulings have moved affected sectors and deal spreads.
people.queries: Supreme Court opinion antitrust patent EPA FTC
people.limitations: Legal significance often requires expert interpretation.

people.name: S&P Dow Jones / MSCI / FTSE Russell
people.tickers: SPX, Russell, MSCI EM/DM, sector ETFs
people.why: Index additions, deletions, and float changes can force passive buying/selling.
people.impactExample: Caused: S&P 500 inclusion announcements often move target stocks before effective dates.
people.queries: S&P 500 inclusion deletion MSCI rebalance Russell reconstitution
people.limitations: Estimated flows need float, liquidity, and ETF-holder analysis.

people.name: Major company IR teams
people.why: Investor days, earnings dates, presentations, 8-Ks, and guidance changes are the cleanest source of company-specific catalysts.
people.impactExample: Caused: Guidance resets and investor-day targets routinely drive 5-20% single-stock moves.
people.queries: site:investors.company.com investor day guidance presentation 8-K
people.limitations: Company framing is biased; pair with filings, transcripts, and independent data.

events.name: FOMC decision, dot plot, minutes, press conference
events.why: Sets discount-rate path and liquidity expectations.
events.impactExample: Caused: 2022 hawkish Fed communication triggered multiple large equity selloffs.
events.bestMonitor: Fed calendar, statement diff, presser transcript
events.queries: FOMC statement dot plot terminal rate Powell
events.limitations: Expected moves often priced; statement nuance matters.

events.name: U.S. CPI release
events.why: Highest-frequency inflation shock for Fed expectations.
events.impactExample: Caused: Sep. 13, 2022 hot CPI aligned with S&P 500 -4.3%.
events.queries: CPI core shelter supercore surprise
events.limitations: Revisions and composition matter more than headline.

events.name: Employment Situation / nonfarm payrolls
events.why: Jobs, unemployment, and wages shift growth/inflation balance.
events.impactExample: Caused: Payroll surprises routinely move front-end yields and index futures within seconds.
events.queries: nonfarm payrolls unemployment average hourly earnings revision
events.limitations: Birth-death model and revisions can reverse initial interpretation.

events.name: Nvidia earnings and GTC / AI product events
events.tickers: NVDA, AMD, TSM, AVGO, SMCI, SOXX
events.why: AI capex bellwether for semis, power, networking, and cloud.
events.impactExample: Caused: May 2023 guide drove NVDA +24-25% and AI sympathy rally.
events.queries: Nvidia data center guide Blackwell supply GTC keynote
events.limitations: Whisper expectations can exceed consensus by a lot.

events.name: FDA PDUFA decisions and advisory committee votes
events.why: Binary approval, label, safety, or CRL outcomes can define company value.
events.impactExample: Caused: Approval/CRL decisions often move small biotechs 30-80%.
events.queries: PDUFA date advisory committee briefing document CRL
events.limitations: No single official PDUFA calendar; need issuer confirmation.

events.name: OPEC+ ministerial and JMMC meetings
events.why: Supply decisions change crude balances and inflation inputs.
events.impactExample: Caused: Apr. 2023 surprise cut sent oil about +6%.
events.queries: OPEC+ quota voluntary cut JMMC compliance
events.limitations: Pre-meeting leaks can be strategic.

events.name: Major technology earnings cluster
events.tickers: MSFT, AAPL, GOOGL, AMZN, META, TSLA
events.why: Mega-cap weights can move index EPS, capex, AI, cloud, and consumer narratives.
events.impactExample: Caused: Meta efficiency and capex resets drove large 2023-2024 single-stock and ad-tech moves.
events.queries: mega cap earnings cloud capex AI guide margin
events.limitations: Read-throughs can conflict by subsector.

events.name: Short-seller report publication
events.why: Can surface accounting, governance, or disclosure risks quickly.
events.impactExample: Caused: Hindenburg Adani and Nikola reports caused large equity drawdowns and regulatory scrutiny.
events.queries: new short report fraud accounting response 8-K
events.limitations: Claims can be disputed and biased; verify evidence.

events.name: Activist 13D, proxy contest, open letter
events.why: Can catalyze buybacks, divestitures, CEO change, margin targets, sale process.
events.impactExample: Caused: Elliott CRM stake and Starboard VRT stake triggered positive target moves.
events.queries: 13D activist letter proxy fight board seat margin
events.limitations: Not every campaign wins; avoid assuming full activist plan.

events.name: M&A announcement, antitrust milestone, shareholder vote
events.why: Deal probability, spread, financing, and remedies can move both parties and peers.
events.impactExample: Caused: FTC/DOJ challenges and court rulings have moved deal spreads and sector multiples.
events.queries: merger vote HSR second request injunction remedy
events.limitations: Regulatory and financing paths are path-dependent.

events.name: S&P, Russell, MSCI index rebalance / inclusion
events.why: Forces passive flows and pre-positioning around additions/deletions.
events.impactExample: Caused: S&P 500 inclusions often cause sharp announcement-date rallies.
events.queries: S&P inclusion Russell reconstitution MSCI rebalance flow ADV
events.limitations: Magnitude depends on float, liquidity, and arbitrage crowding.

events.name: U.S. Treasury refunding and major auctions
events.tickers: UST curve, banks, housing, long-duration growth
events.why: Coupon sizes and auction tails affect term premium and equity duration.
events.impactExample: Caused: Refunding surprises and weak long-bond auctions have moved yields and equity factors.
events.queries: Treasury refunding TBAC coupon sizes auction tail bid cover
events.limitations: Curve impact depends on positioning and Fed balance sheet policy.

events.name: Jackson Hole Economic Symposium
events.why: Central bankers can use it to reset reaction functions.
events.impactExample: Caused: Powell's Aug. 26, 2022 speech hit equities and risk assets.
events.bestMonitor: Kansas City Fed agenda, speech text
events.queries: Jackson Hole Powell speech monetary policy
events.limitations: Some years are academic and low-signal.

events.name: ECB, BOJ, PBOC policy meetings
events.why: Non-U.S. policy surprises spill into dollar, commodities, and global duration.
events.impactExample: Caused: BOJ Dec. 2022 YCC surprise jolted yen and bonds.
events.queries: BOJ YCC ECB wages PBOC RRR stimulus
events.limitations: Cross-market impact can be nonlinear.

events.name: Apple product launches / WWDC
events.why: Can reset product-cycle, AI, services, and supplier expectations.
events.impactExample: Caused: iPhone and AI feature launches move supplier and mega-cap tech narratives.
events.bestMonitor: Apple events, developer docs, supplier reports
events.queries: Apple event iPhone AI WWDC supplier shipment
events.limitations: Launch buzz does not always convert to upgrade demand.

events.name: Investor days and long-term target updates
events.why: New TAM, margin, capex, capital-return targets can change valuation framework.
events.impactExample: Caused: Positive margin targets often re-rate industrial/software names; disappointments trigger de-rating.
events.queries: investor day long term targets margin CAGR buyback
events.limitations: Management incentives can make targets promotional.

events.name: Clinical trial topline and medical conference data
events.why: Endpoint, safety, durability, and competitive data can change probability of approval and peak sales.
events.impactExample: Caused: ASCO/AACR/ESMO abstracts and readouts often move oncology and biotech names sharply.
events.queries: topline data phase 2 phase 3 hazard ratio p-value safety
events.limitations: Abstracts can omit key safety and subgroup details.

events.name: CMS reimbursement, Medicare rate, and coverage decisions
events.why: Reimbursement and coverage updates change revenue/margin assumptions.
events.impactExample: Caused: Medicare Advantage rate notices and dialysis/medtech policy updates move affected healthcare names.
events.queries: CMS rate notice Medicare Advantage final rule reimbursement
events.limitations: Technical details require policy expertise.

events.name: Weekly EIA petroleum and natural gas storage
events.why: Inventory surprises move futures and energy equities.
events.impactExample: Caused: Large gas storage surprises frequently move natgas futures several percent.
events.queries: EIA crude build draw natural gas storage surprise
events.limitations: Weather and export outages can dominate weekly noise.

events.name: SEC crypto ETF, enforcement, and rule decisions
events.why: Approvals and enforcement change access, liquidity, and compliance costs.
events.impactExample: Caused: Spot crypto ETF decision windows moved BTC and crypto equities.
events.queries: SEC spot ETF approval enforcement Coinbase staking
events.limitations: Rumors spread quickly; rely on filing/order text.

events.name: Bank earnings and stress-test results
events.tickers: JPM, BAC, C, WFC, KRE, XLF
events.why: NII, credit losses, deposits, capital returns, and CRE exposure drive financial-sector risk.
events.impactExample: Caused: SVB and regional-bank deposit/liquidity disclosures in 2023 triggered severe bank equity moves.
events.bestMonitor: Earnings calls, Fed CCAR, FDIC data
events.queries: bank NII deposit beta CRE losses CET1 buyback
events.limitations: Accounting marks and held-to-maturity details need careful reading.

events.name: Retail sales, PCE inflation, ISM, JOLTS, GDP
events.why: Second-tier macro can confirm or challenge CPI/jobs message.
events.impactExample: Caused: ISM and retail-sales surprises move yields and cyclicals when growth path is uncertain.
events.queries: PCE supercore retail sales control group ISM prices paid
events.limitations: Often matters through Fed reaction function, not standalone.

events.name: Geopolitical sanctions, wars, and shipping disruptions
events.why: Sanctions and conflict can alter supply chains, energy flows, and defense spending.
events.impactExample: Caused: Russia-Ukraine invasion repriced energy, wheat, defense, and European assets.
events.bestMonitor: OFAC, maritime data, official defense releases
events.queries: sanctions tanker Red Sea Strait Hormuz LNG export
events.limitations: Information quality varies during conflict.

events.name: Debt ceiling, government shutdown, fiscal deadline
events.why: Can stress front-end bills, ratings, and federal spending timing.
events.impactExample: Caused: Debt-ceiling standoffs have moved T-bill yields and risk sentiment.
events.queries: debt ceiling X-date Treasury cash balance shutdown
events.limitations: Political headlines can reverse intraday.

events.name: Defense budget, NDAA, major contract awards
events.tickers: LMT, RTX, NOC, GD, HII, PLTR
events.why: Authorization, appropriations, and contract awards shape backlog and program risk.
events.impactExample: Caused: Large contract awards and budget changes can move primes and suppliers.
events.queries: DoD contract hypersonic missile NDAA procurement
events.limitations: Contract headline value can span many years.

events.name: IPO lockup expirations, follow-ons, ATM, convertibles
events.why: Float increases and financing can pressure shares or solve runway risk.
events.impactExample: Caused: Biotech and growth secondaries often gap stocks down on dilution, while runway relief can reverse.
events.queries: lock-up expiration secondary offering ATM convertible pricing
events.limitations: Actual selling pressure depends on holder base and borrow.

events.name: Bankruptcy, restructuring, covenant, refinancing deadlines
events.why: Liquidity events can wipe equity, reprice peers, or trigger M&A.
events.impactExample: Caused: SVB collapse and later distressed filings drove large sector moves and policy response.
events.queries: Chapter 11 restructuring support agreement covenant default
events.limitations: Equity recoveries require capital-structure analysis.

events.name: Crypto exchange listings, delistings, hacks, reserve updates
events.why: Listings affect liquidity; hacks and reserve concerns change counterparty risk.
events.impactExample: Caused: Exchange solvency and legal headlines have caused crypto-wide volatility.
events.queries: exchange hack proof of reserves delisting listing
events.limitations: Social rumors can front-run official statements.

events.name: Autos and EV delivery reports
events.tickers: TSLA, RIVN, LCID, GM, F, lithium miners
events.why: Monthly/quarterly deliveries, pricing, inventories, and incentives update demand and margin assumptions.
events.impactExample: Caused: Tesla delivery misses and price cuts have moved EV stocks and suppliers.
events.queries: EV deliveries price cuts inventory incentives recall
events.limitations: Regional registration data is partial and timing-skewed.

events.name: Retail traffic, credit-card, and holiday-sales data
events.tickers: WMT, TGT, COST, AMZN, apparel, restaurants
events.why: Early spending signals can anticipate earnings and guidance risk.
events.impactExample: Anticipated: Weak traffic or card data often precedes retail earnings misses.
events.queries: retail sales traffic markdowns credit card data holiday
events.limitations: Alternative data coverage and mix can be biased.

events.name: Real estate rate cases, CRE delinquencies, REIT updates
events.why: Occupancy, cap rates, refinancing, and credit stress affect REITs and lenders.
events.impactExample: Anticipated: CRE stress headlines have pressured regional banks and office REITs.
events.bestMonitor: REIT reports, CMBS data, bank filings
events.queries: CRE delinquency office refinance cap rate maturity wall
events.limitations: Private-market marks lag public securities.

events.name: Semiconductor trade controls and CHIPS grants
events.tickers: NVDA, AMD, ASML, TSM, INTC, SMH
events.why: Export restrictions and subsidies change TAM, capex, and China exposure.
events.impactExample: Caused: U.S. export-control updates have moved AI chip and equipment stocks.
events.queries: BIS export control AI chip China license HBM
events.limitations: Rules require detailed product-level interpretation.

events.name: Shipping, freight, and port disruption events
events.why: Freight rates and chokepoints affect margins, delivery timing, and goods inflation.
events.impactExample: Caused: Red Sea disruptions and pandemic port congestion repriced shipping rates and retailers.
events.queries: Red Sea container rates port strike Panama Canal drought
events.limitations: Spot freight impact varies by contract exposure.

events.name: Election, tariff, tax, and regulatory hearings
events.why: Policy probability changes can alter sector multiples and earnings power.
events.impactExample: Caused: Tariff and healthcare-policy headlines have driven sector rotations.
events.queries: tariff hearing drug pricing tax bill regulation final rule
events.limitations: Campaign promises often fail to become policy.

events.name: Major industry conferences
events.tickers: JPM Healthcare, CES, Computex, GTC, CERAWeek, Dreamforce
events.why: Management meetings, product demos, and data presentations create clustered sector catalysts.
events.impactExample: Caused: Healthcare and semiconductor conference disclosures often move small and large-cap names.
events.queries: conference presentation webcast fireside guidance data
events.limitations: Many appearances are low-content; prioritize prepared remarks and slides.

sources.name: SEC EDGAR
sources.why: Primary source for 8-K, 10-Q, 13D, 13F, S-1, proxy, merger, offering filings.
sources.impactExample: Activist 13D, guidance 8-K, secondary filings can move stocks immediately.
sources.queries: form 8-K Item 2.02 13D 424B5 S-4 DEF14A
sources.limitations: Requires parsing; filing volume is noisy.

sources.name: Company investor relations pages
sources.why: Best source for event dates, decks, earnings materials, investor days, webcasts.
sources.impactExample: Guidance and investor-day targets frequently move shares 5-20%.

sources.name: Federal Reserve FOMC pages

sources.name: BLS release calendar and data

sources.limitations: Legal interpretation needed for market impact.

priorityAlertNote: Priority alert design: combine a primary-source trigger with a market reaction filter. Example: SEC 8-K Item 2.02 OR 7.01 plus abnormal premarket volume, or FDA briefing document plus biotech watchlist ticker.

playbookNote: Use the universe as a catalyst radar, not a buy/sell list. Every alert should be classified as primary fact, credible secondary report, social/rumor, or PM judgment before it enters a thesis or risk decision.
guidance: Start with primary sources. For companies use IR, EDGAR, exchange notices, and court/regulator filings. For macro use Fed, BLS, BEA, Treasury, EIA, ECB/BOJ/PBOC, OPEC, and official calendars.
Score every hit. Assign impact 1-5, confidence high/medium/low, and actionability. Upgrade low-confidence/high-impact items for human review rather than trading them automatically.
Separate cause from prediction. A short report, FDA decision, or FOMC statement may cause a move. A strategist, analyst, or newsletter may only anticipate one. Treat these differently in backtests.
Use cross-source confirmation. Pair social or press alerts with filings, official statements, on-chain data, price/volume, options, borrow, and peer read-throughs.
Build watchlists by exposure. Map each catalyst to tickers, ETFs, suppliers, customers, peers, debt, commodities, and currencies. Many catalysts first appear in one venue and move another asset.

Track false positives. Store alerts that did not move markets, activist campaigns that failed, product launches that were priced in, and rumors that were denied. This improves future reliability scores.
Refresh time-sensitive dates. Earnings, PDUFA, court hearings, index events, merger votes, lockups, macro releases, and conferences can change. Never convert an inferred window into a hard date.
Turn high-impact events into work items. For each top catalyst, define the model line affected, confirm/disconfirm signal, prep owner, post-event update, and add/hold/trim/exit or hedge implication.
